headline: FOX to Integrate Kalshi Forecasts Across FOX News Media and FOX One Platforms
summary: NEW YORK, April 07, 2026--Kalshi, the world’s largest prediction market, and Fox Corporation (NASDAQ: FOXA, FOX), ​​a leader in producing and distributing news, sports and entertainment content, today announced an integration to incorporate Kalshi’s data across FOX News Channel, FOX Business Network, FOX Weather and the FOX One platform.

raw.headline: FOX to Integrate Kalshi Forecasts Across FOX News Media and FOX One Platforms

headline: Kalshi Posts On X "Fox News x Kalshi. The largest news network in America integrates Kalshi. Prediction markets add accountability by rewarding accuracy. That's why the three leading networks have chosen Kalshi. No spin. No partisan lens. Just incentives to be right."

headline: Assessing Fox (FOXA) Valuation As Tubi’s New Ad Tools And Partnerships Gain Attention
summary: Tubi’s new ad tools and content tie-ups put Fox in focus Fox (FOXA) is back in the spotlight after its streaming platform Tubi announced new ad formats, measurement tools, and programming partnerships with Apple TV and TikTok at IAB NewFronts in New York. See our latest analysis for Fox. Despite the excitement around Tubi’s product and partnership announcements, Fox’s recent share price performance has been mixed. The 1-day share price return is 1.16% and the 90-day share price return...
